channel.title: aws on The musings of Mister Davido
channel.description: Recent content in aws on The musings of Mister Davido

item.title: Part 1 - Create and deploy an automated, serverless Newegg stock checker using Python, Lambda, and Terraform
item.description: In this series, we’re going to create a “stock checker” in Python, and then later on, we’re going to deploy it on AWS. We’re not going to spin up any EC2 instances either; this is going to be running as a “serverless” bot. And we’re not going to need to have to do much, if any, clicking and pointing in the AWS console, thanks to the power of Terraform. Stock checker?
